name: 24 Golf Eagan
about: 24 Golf Eagan is an indoor golf facility focused on providing serious golfers with access to technology used by the top 1% of players. The venue offers 24/7 access to its simulators and practice areas, designed to help members lower their scores through data-driven practice. With a no-frills approach centered entirely on golf improvement, the facility uses premium launch monitors and high-end simulator software to provide instant feedback on both ball and club performance, translating practice results to the course.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 self-service access to high-end golf simulators and practice areas
Premium technology including GC Quad and GC Hawk launch monitors for precise feedback
Comprehensive practice options including a dedicated putting green with PuttView and chipping area
A supportive community focused on skill improvement with events and coaching opportunities

food_and_drink.notes: Food available through nearby Mason Jar Kitchen and Bar, with delivery service to the facility
No bar on-site; BYOB policy with liquor store available in same strip mall

simulator_hardware.notes: Five units, world's most precise launch monitor with Quadrascopic imaging
One unit, overhead-mounted launch monitor with object recognition technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available from nearby Mason Jar Kitchen and Bar with delivery service, but no alcohol is served on-site. BYOB is allowed, though you cannot take drinks back to the simulators.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 24 Golf's technology, you can play a full 18-hole round in about one hour.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children under 12 can practice and play for free, and the facility offers a family-friendly atmosphere with programming suitable for juniors.
